pr.title: Loss function comparison (CE vs P2 variants) under parameter-golf constraints

output.summary: Parameter-golf GPT uses P2 loss, wallclock-aware warmdown, residual mixing/conv token mixer, and Muon+Adam split to co-design training and quantized compression.
techniques: P2 difficulty-scaled loss prioritizing low-confidence tokens
Wallclock-aware learning-rate warmdown tailored to the 10-minute cap
Muon+Adam split with conv token mixing and late-stage int6 QAT
